auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your space.
auth.signupSubtitle: Join our community and start your journey.

errors.auth/email-already-in-use: An account already exists with this email address.
errors.auth/weak-password: Password should be at least 6 characters.
errors.auth/user-not-found: No account found with this email address.
errors.auth/account-exists-with-different-crede: An account with this email already exists via another method (e.g. Email/Password). Please use that method.
errors.auth/popup-closed-by-user: The sign-in window was closed. Please try again.
errors.auth/popup-blocked: The sign-in window was blocked by the browser. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
errors.auth/unauthorized-domain: This site is not authorized for Google authentication. Please contact the administrator.
errors.auth/generic: An authentication error occurred. Please try again.
